channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

  2. R1 zooms out of stealth with $77.5M series A to advance chronic kidney disease treatment  Fierce Biotech
  3. R1 starts up with $78M, aiming for a better kidney drug  BioPharma Dive
  4. Biotechnology Start-Up Partners with Alebund Pharmaceuticals to Develop New Therapy for Hyperphosphatemia in CKD Patients  geneonline.com
  5. Alebund Pharmaceuticals Announces Collaboration and License Agreement with R1 Therapeutics for AP306  Yahoo Finance

item.title: Amazon introduces 1-hour and 3-hour delivery in U.S. - CBS News
item.description:
1. Amazon introduces 1-hour and 3-hour delivery in U.S.  CBS News
  2. Amazon introduces faster delivery with new 1-hour and 3-hour options  About Amazon
  3. Amazon rolls out 1-hour, 3-hour delivery as ultrafast shipping trend grows in the U.S.  CNBC
  4. Amazon speeds up deliveries in L.A. and elsewhere with one-hour option  Los Angeles Times
  5. Amazon adds 1-hour and 3-hour delivery options in the US  TechCrunch

item.title: Stryker attack wiped tens of thousands of devices, no malware needed - BleepingComputer
item.description:
1. Stryker attack wiped tens of thousands of devices, no malware needed  BleepingComputer
  2. Stryker attack raises concerns about role of device management tool  Cybersecurity Dive
  3. How ‘Handala’ Became the Face of Iran’s Hacker Counterattacks  WIRED
  4. Stryker says it's restoring systems after pro-Iran hackers wiped thousands of employee devices  TechCrunch
  5. Stryker says cyberattack on its network contained  Reuters

item.title: Nvidia Just Blew a Big Hole in the Case to Buy Tesla Stock - Barron's
item.description:
1. Nvidia Just Blew a Big Hole in the Case to Buy Tesla Stock  Barron's
  2. Uber’s stock powers higher as Nvidia robotaxi deal helps avert ‘doomsday’ scenario  MarketWatch
  3. BYD, Geely, Isuzu and Nissan Adopt NVIDIA DRIVE Hyperion for Level 4 Vehicles  NVIDIA Newsroom
  4. Nvidia Is Expanding Its Robotaxi Push. Uber, Lyft, and Other Partner Stocks Are Getting a Boost.  Yahoo Finance

item.title: Stock Market News, March 17, 2026: Dow Jumps, Brent Crude Pulls Back From $105 Oil Gains Amid Mideast Attacks - WSJ
item.description:
1. Stock Market News, March 17, 2026: Dow Jumps, Brent Crude Pulls Back From $105 Oil Gains Amid Mideast Attacks  WSJ
  2. Oil prices jump as Iran warns Strait of Hormuz ‘cannot be the same’  CNN
  3. Oil's Calm Morning Ends With a Jump  WSJ
  4. Oil and gas prices rise again after Iran attacks production facilities  The Guardian
  5. U.S. oil soars past $100 a barrel, as Iran war shows no signs of ending soon  NBC News
